title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: Three high-severity reports resolved: (1) spam_wave_42 banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels. (2) toxic_runner banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. (3) report against core_maintainer closed as false positive — mass reporting by brigading users after a legitimate moderation decision. Trusted members remain protected. No further action needed on remaining medium/low reports at this time.
